entry.title: S/4HANA Public Cloud Customizing Purchase contract expiry status transition
entry.content:
Dear experts,

In S/4HANA Public Cloud, the validity status of a purchase contrat changes to "Expiring" 30 days before its end validity date.

My customer requires the ability to modify this behavior and customize the timeframe from when the statut moves from "valid" to "expiring". For example:

Contract 1 moves to "expiring" status 90 days before the end validity date

Contract 2 moves to "expiring" status 60 days before the end validity date.

Could you please confirm if it is possible to adjust this setting? If so, what would be the recommended approach to configure it?

Thank you for your support

entry.title: Is there a project plan for integrating Solution Manager ITSM with GRC?
entry.content:
It has been many years (maybe decades) since I was asked to do this and much of my documentation has been destroyed.

Does anyone have a project plan to integrate Solution Manager 7.2 with GRC 12.0?

I'll keep looking in what's left of my own, and elsewhere online, but appreciate any help.

Thank you.

entry.content:
Olá Otávio

Muito obrigado pela informação. Iremos analisar ambos os eventos.

Atenciosamente,

Guilherme Zenzen

entry.title: Re: No Identity Provisioning on IAS
entry.content:
This note is no help https://me.sap.com/notes/0003521979
I have an IPS issue on IAS.

entry.title: Are necessary to stop ASE server and replication in order to DUMP and DISK RESIZE in ASE?
entry.content:
Issue : 

 

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

 

ASE @Site1
##
00:0003:00000:00025:2024/10/29 22:43:08.03 server  Error: 1105, Severity: 17, State: 2
00:0003:00000:00025:2024/10/29 22:43:08.08 server  Can't allocate space for object 'js_output' in database 'sybmgmtdb' because 'default' segment is full/has no free extents. If you ran out of space in syslogs, dump the transaction log. Otherwise, use ALTER DATABASE to increase the size of the segment.
...
00:0003:00000:00019:2025/03/12 14:45:03.83 server  Error: 1105, Severity: 17, State: 2
00:0003:00000:00019:2025/03/12 14:45:03.83 server  Can't allocate space for object 'js_history' in database 'sybmgmtdb' because 'default' segment is full/has no free extents. If you ran out of space in syslogs, dump the transaction log. Otherwise, use ALTER DATABASE to increase the size of the segment.
00:0003:00000:00019:2025/03/12 14:45:03.83 kernel  Job Scheduler (js__exec_handler): Exception 3602 raised.
00:0003:00000:00019:2025/03/12 14:45:03.83 kernel  Job Scheduler got exception for execution token 1.
##

 

Our actions for this problem: 

 

1.Take the backup of sybmgmtdb database in primary Site1 node.

 

dump database sybmgmtdb to "/path/sybmgmtdb.dmp"

 

If we run it when primary DB, application and Replication is online and running then should it be a problem ?

 

OR 

 

2.

 

Check database current log devices:

 

sp_helpdb <SID>
go

 

To resize an existing log device:

 

use master
go
disk resize name = '<existing_log_device_name>', size = '<size in GB>G'  -- size is what is being added, not the total target size of the device
go
alter database <dbname> log on <existing_log_device_name> = '<size in GB>G' 
go

 

If we run it when primary DB, application and Replication is online and running then should it be a problem ?

 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Are necessary to stop ASE server and replication in o...
entry.content:
Dear customer, 

Regarding to this error, it is important to consider that the DEFAULT segment is a DATA one, not a LOG one. 

About the other requests:

No, it are not necessary to stop the replication and ASE server (such as the disk resize are executed into ISQL connection). 

We just have an advise about the disk resize with replication server:

  1. First, double check that there is enough space to increase the size.
  2. It is recommended to increase the same amount on the device in the other site of replication.

Here is a document about the disk resize: 

disk resize | SAP Help Portal

entry.title: Re: SAML and 2212795
entry.content: The current SAML inplementation on BOBJ only supports 1 URL so itr must be either HTTPS or HTTP. Supporting multiple URL's must be added as an enhancement, or by using multiple web/apps (each can be it's own URL)

entry.title: Adding Successors Column to Calibration Session
entry.content:
Hello,

Our client wants to be able to add/edit succession nominations within the calibration list view. Instead of opening the Talent Card, they want an additional column. It should be editable like the Talent Flag columns.

Does anyone know how I can add that?

Thanks in advance!

entry.title: Remote Freelance SAP Job Opportunities | Romania
entry.content:
🚀 Join a Global Project as an SAP Consultant! 🚀

We’re hiring an experienced SAP CO, SAP FI, SAP IBP, SAP PP Consultant for a long-term, remote B2B freelance roles in #Romania with a leading global client. If you’re skilled in SAP Modules and want to work on impactful projects, this is your opportunity!

🔹 Role: SAP CO , FI, IBP, PP Consultants 
🔹 Location: #Remote (Romania)
🔹 Engagement: #B2B #Freelance

What We’re Looking For:
✅ Strong expertise in SAP CO / FI / PP / IBP
✅ Ability to work independently in a remote setup
✅ Fluent English & excellent communication skills

💼 Interested? Send your CV to 📩 sagar.r@dabster.net or #refer a consultant in your #network!

#SAPCO #SAPIBP #SAPPP #SAPConsultant #FreelanceOpportunity #RemoteJob #SAPJobs #B2B #Hiring

entry.title: Re: Get started with the ABAP custom code migration process
entry.content:
@BaerbelWinkler,

Hi Bärbel,

it is always good to have the central ATC system on the newest release :-). Actually I don't expect, that the 2021 release could be a problem for the scoping based on SUSG snapshots. This functionality was implemented a long time ago and should be stable. I would rather suspect, that something is wrong with the SUSG snapshot(s).

Best regards,
Olga.

entry.title: Re: #CoE#LAL Cannot create sales order with customer down...
entry.content:
Hello,

free goods are not invoice-relevant, as they do not generate any payment obligations. In contrast, a down payment requires billing and revenue recognition. Therefore, receiving an advance payment for items that do not require payment is not feasible.

entry.title: how to format date in Fiori elements odata V2 ?
entry.content:
Hello Experts!

I havbe odata field type DateTime.

It is used in following contexts:

  1. .Filtering on list report
  2. data entry on objecdt page.

I would like to format it so that it displays only month and year. 
I cannot find resource on how to do it in XML annotation - my backend is SEGW based so i cannot use CDS.

Anmy advice on how to do it ?

entry.title: AI-Driven Error Handling in SAP CPI: Automating Troubleshooting with OpenAI
entry.content:
The Problem: Manual Error Handling is a Pain

If you've worked with SAP Cloud Platform Integration (CPI) for long enough, you know that errors are inevitable. Whether it's a failed connection, a mapping issue, or an authentication error, troubleshooting these issues can be tedious and time-consuming.

Traditionally, error handling in SAP CPI follows a reactive approach:

  • Retry mechanisms attempt to process failed messages again.
  • Logging and tracing help developers analyze failures manually.
  • Exception subprocesses handle errors within iFlows.
  • Alerts and notifications (via email, SMS, or monitoring tools) let users know something went wrong.

While these mechanisms are useful, they still require manual intervention. An integration specialist must check logs, analyze error messages, and search for solutions—consuming valuable time and effort. Often, resolving an issue involves sifting through extensive logs, understanding error patterns, and relying on experience or documentation to diagnose the problem.

What if we could automate this process? What if we could analyze errors and get possible resolutions in real-time? This is where AI-driven error handling comes into play, offering a smarter, faster way to manage integration failures.

The Solution: AI-Powered Error Resolution

By integrating AI into SAP CPI error handling, we can shift from a reactive to a proactive approach. Using OpenAI's API, we can:

  • Instantly analyze error messages.
  • Identify potential root causes.
  • Receive AI-generated resolution steps in an HTML table format.
  • Automatically notify relevant teams with structured solutions.
  • Improve overall integration system efficiency by reducing downtime.

This eliminates the need for manually sifting through logs, reducing resolution time and improving efficiency. AI-powered automation helps organizations ensure that their integrations are more resilient, minimizing disruptions in business processes.

How It Works

 1. Prerequisites
Before diving into the actual implementation steps, make sure the following prerequisites are in
place:
• SAP CPI Account: Ensure your SAP CPI tenant is active and accessible.
• API Access to OpenAI: Obtain an API key from OpenAI or another AI service provider that
will be used to process error messages. Go to this website and create your own key :
https://platform.openai.com/settings/organization/api-keys
• Basic Knowledge of iFlow Design: Familiarity with SAP CPI iFlow design, Exception
Subprocess, and adapters is crucial.
• Mail Adapter Configuration: Ensure the Mail Adapter is configured for sending notifications via email.

2. Capturing Errors

When an error occurs in an iFlow, an Exception Handling Subprocess captures the error details. This subprocess is designed to handle different types of failures such as connectivity issues, data mapping errors, authentication failures, or processing exceptions. The Exception Handling Subprocess logs the error message and extracts key details like the error type, timestamp, iFlow name, and correlation ID.

3. Sending the Error to OpenAI

Once the error details are captured, an HTTP Adapter is used to send the error message to OpenAI’s API for analysis. The HTTP Adapter is configured as follows:

  • Endpoint URL: The OpenAI API URL (e.g., https://api.openai.com/v1/completions)
  • HTTP Method: POST
  • Headers:
    • Authorization: Bearer YOUR_API_KEY
    • Content-Type: application/json
  • Request Body: Contains the error message formatted as a JSON request.

Example Sample JSON request:

 

{
 "model": "gpt-4",
 "prompt": "Analyze the following error and provide a cause and resolution in HTML table format: Error: Invalid API key",
 "max_tokens": 100
}

 

4. AI-Generated Resolutions

Once the request is sent, OpenAI processes the error message using its trained model and responds with:

  • Possible root causes based on historical patterns.
  • Suggested resolution steps formatted as an HTML table.
  • Additional context-based recommendations.

Example AI-generated response:

 

{
  "choices": [
    {
      "message": {
        "content": "<table><tr><td>Error Cause</td><td>Invalid API Key</td></tr><tr><td>Resolution</td><td>Check the API Key in the HTTP Adapter and update it with the correct one.</td></tr></table>"
      }
    }
  ]
}

 

5. Formatting the Response

To ensure the AI-generated response is readable and structured correctly, it is processed using:

  • JSON to XML Converter: Converts the response to XML format for easier manipulation.
  • Content Modifier: Extracts the HTML content from the AI response.
  • Groovy Script: Enhances the message formatting by adding additional iFlow metadata (such as error timestamps, correlation ID, and impacted business process) before sending the final output.

The Groovy script ensures that the AI-generated resolution is presented in a structured and user-friendly manner.

 

import com.sap.gateway.ip.core.customdev.util.Message;
 
def Message processData(Message message) {
 
    def body = message.getBody(java.lang.String) as String;
    def headers = message.getHeaders();
    def map = message.getProperties();
    def InterfaceName = headers.get("InterfaceName") as String;
    def IflowName = headers.get("IflowName") as String;
    def CorrelationId = headers.get("CorrelationId");
    def MessageId = headers.get("MessageId");
    def ExceptionMessage = headers.get("ExceptionMessage");
    def ErrorDescription = headers.get("ErrorDescription");
    def SendPayloadasAttachment = headers.get("SendPayloadasAttachment");
    def MailTo = headers.get("MailTo");
    def MailCC = headers.get("MailCC");
    def PackageName = headers.get("PackageName");
    def ReceiverFileName = headers.get("ReceiverFileName");
    def ReceiverFilePath = headers.get("ReceiverFilePath");
    def TenantID = "";
    String Subject = "";
    def RetryRequired = headers.get("RetryRequired");
    def exceptionName = "";
    def mailBody = "";
    def CustomErrorMsg = headers.get("CustomErrorMessage")
    String systemName = System.getenv("TENANT_NAME")
 
 
 
    //for ErrorDescription
    def regex = /(?s)<!DOCTYPE html>.*?<\/html>/
 
    // Apply the regex to the ErrorDescription
    def result = (ErrorDescription =~ regex)
    // Extract the matched content and replace all whitespace (newlines, spaces, etc.) with a blank space
    if (result) {
        // Replace all whitespace (newlines, spaces, etc.) with a single blank space
        ErrorDescription = result[0].replaceAll("\n", " ")
    }
 
    //closing ErrorDescription
 
    if(systemName.equals("sap-integration-suite-development"))
    {
        TenantID = "SAP CPI Development Environment"
    }
    else if(systemName.equals("bek-sap-integration-suite-qa"))
    {
        TenantID = "SAP CPI Quality Environment"
    }
    else if(systemName.equals("bek-sap-integration-suite"))
    {
        TenantID = "SAP CPI UAT Environment"
    }
    else
    {
        TenantID = "SAP CPI"
    }
    if(RetryRequired.equals('yes'))
    {
        exceptionName = "Message Failed After Multiple Retries"
         Subject = "Message Failed After Multiple Retries for Interface "+InterfaceName+"("+IflowName+")"+" in "+TenantID;
    }
    else{
         exceptionName = "Error in Message Processing"
         Subject = "Error occured in "+IflowName+" in "+TenantID;
    }
 
    String url = System.getenv("TENANT_NAME")+"."+System.getenv("IT_SYSTEM_ID")+"."+System.getenv("IT_TENANT_UX_DOMAIN")
    def msgIDLink = "https://"+url+":443/itspaces/shell/monitoring/MessageDetails/%7B%22messageGuid%22%3A%22"+MessageId+"%22%7D";
 
    mailBody =  "<html><head><style>table, th, td {"+
                    "border: 1px solid black;"+
                    "}</style></head><body>"+
                    "<table><tr><th colspan='2'><b><center>"+IflowName+"</center></b></th></tr>"+
                    "<tr><td><b>CPI System</b></td><td>"+TenantID+"</td></tr>"+
                    "<tr><td><b>Package Details</b></td><td>"+PackageName+"</td></tr>"+
                    "<tr><td><b>Receiver File Name</b></td><td>"+ReceiverFileName+"</td></tr>"+
                    "<tr><td><b>Receiver File Directory</b></td><td>"+ReceiverFilePath+"</td></tr>"+
                    "<tr><td><b>Message ID  </b></td><td><a href='"+msgIDLink+"'>"+MessageId+"</a></td></tr>"+
                    "<tr><td><b>Correlation Id</b></td><td>"+CorrelationId+"</td></tr>"+
                    "<tr><th colspan='2'><b><center>Exception Details</center></b></th></tr>"+
                    "<tr><td colspan='2'>"+ErrorDescription+"</td></tr>"+
                    "<tr><td><b> Name of Exception </b></td><td>"+exceptionName+"</td></tr>"+
                    "<tr><td><b> Details of Exception </b></td><td>"+ExceptionMessage+"</td></tr>"+
                    "<tr><td><b> Custom Exception </b></td><td>"+CustomErrorMsg+"</td></tr></table>"+
                    "<br/><p>Thanks and Regards<br/>Integration Team</p>"+
                    "<p>** This is an auto generated email **</p>"+
                    "</body></html>";
    message.setProperty("To",MailTo)
    message.setProperty("CC",MailCC)
    message.setProperty("mailbody", mailBody);
    message.setProperty("mailSubject", Subject);
    message.setBody(mailBody);
    if(SendPayloadasAttachment.equals("yes"))
    {
        message.setHeader("Payload",body);
    }
    return message;
}

 

6. Sending Email Notifications

The final step involves sending the formatted error report to stakeholders via the Mail Adapter. The email notification contains:

  • Error details: iFlow name, timestamp, correlation ID, and error type.
  • AI-generated root cause analysis and resolution steps.
  • Follow-up actions: Suggestions for preventing similar errors in the future.

The Mail Adapter is configured with SMTP settings to ensure reliable delivery of error reports to relevant teams, allowing for quick resolution and minimizing downtime.

Benefits of AI-Based Error Handling

✅Faster troubleshooting – No more digging through logs; AI instantly analyzes errors.

✅Automated root cause analysis – AI detects patterns and suggests probable causes.

✅Reduced manual effort – Less time spent on error resolution, leading to increased productivity.

✅More accurate solutions – AI-based suggestions improve resolution accuracy, reducing trial-and-error fixes.

✅Proactive issue handling – AI can even predict and prevent recurring errors by leveraging historical data.

✅Improved scalability – AI-driven error handling allows CPI to scale more efficiently by reducing human dependencies.

Wrapping Up

AI-driven error handling in SAP CPI is a step toward intelligent automation. By leveraging OpenAI, we can analyze errors in real-time, reduce manual troubleshooting, and improve integration reliability. AI not only helps in resolving errors but also ensures that organizations have better visibility into their integration health.

Incorporating AI into CPI error handling means fewer disruptions, increased efficiency, and a more resilient integration landscape. As AI continues to evolve, its role in automation and process optimization will only expand, making it an essential tool for enterprises.

If you're dealing with frequent SAP CPI errors, why not let AI handle them for you?

💬Have thoughts or questions? Drop them in the comments below!

Authors : @Shubham_K_Rawat @CharishmaKuncha

entry.title: SAP Disclosure Management read data from Azure datalake
entry.content:
Hi experts,

I need help about types of connections SAP DM from Azure data lake. I saw some contents and has a possibility of connection SAC with Azure and after connect to SAP DM (Analysis for Office or SAC for Excel directly in SAP DM datacache).

Or using Excel funtionalities (guide Data) and connect from Azure datalake directly in SAP DM datacache.

Is there another options and can you share with me (contents, how to, etc.)?

Thanks,
Felipe B.

SAP Disclosure Management

entry.title: interview central and interview scheduling - can they be unlinked and used independently?
entry.content: Hello,   Is there a way to use Int Central WITHOUT using Int Scheduling?   I have never seen a way to get candidates into Int Central while using Int Scheduling (it is configured/on).   There is conflicting information that they can be used independently but I think it is referring to using Int Central without Int Scheduling or Int Scheduling without Int Central.   Thanks, Heather

Best Regards
MF

entry.title: Re: Put a New ZTable on SM30

entry.title: Re: Please help me to understand the integration process...
entry.content:
@Venu, Thank you for the response!
Still I've few clarifications,

Question 1: As long as we have an material ledger, can we do rolling calculations, and is there anything in particular that we should be aware of and align between the 2-tier ERP, such as organization definitions, special procurement type settings, etc.?
Also, In this case, Can we handle Calculation only at head quarter (Private cloud) and getting details from Subsidiary public cloud system?

Question 2: Is the method of integration between the two tiers an API (I was hoping you could give me an example)? Also, if it is an API, is it to set up APIs for both the public cloud and the private cloud to work together?

entry.title: Export S4 hana data as a file to GCS using datasphere
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

Using SAP DATA SPHERE Can we transfer file to GCS bucket?Kindly suggest.

entry.title: Re: Develop Powerful Analytical Queries using ABAP Core Data Services (CDS)
entry.content:
Hello @stefan_unnebrink ,

thank you, RSRT is really helpful. I am able to test the transient view in S/4 system.

I also want to consume the "transient view entity" via Fiori App F1068 (Query Browser) (-> Multidimensional Web Dynpro Report) or any other front-end e.g. Analysis for Office or SAC.

@EndUserText.label: 'First CDS Analytical Projection View'
@AccessControl.authorizationCheck: #NOT_ALLOWED

define transient view entity ZCO_Transient_View1
  provider contract analytical_query
as projection on I_ActualPlanJrnlEntryItemCube

 Is this possible? What annotation do i have to add to the cds view?

I tested with @Analytics.technicalName: 'ZCO_Transient_View2' but it does not show up.

 

When i use "define view" i add two annotations about "analytical query" and the cds view can be comsumed in the app F1068.

@AccessControl.authorizationCheck: true
@AbapCatalog.sqlViewName: 'ZCO_SQL_COST'
@AbapCatalog.compiler.compareFilter: true
@AbapCatalog.preserveKey: true
@EndUserText.label: 'Cost Center Master Data'

@Analytics.query: true
@ObjectModel.modelingPattern: #ANALYTICAL_QUERY

define view ZCO_C_COSTC1 as select from I_CostCenter

Thank you

David

entry.title: LV61A081 LV61A082 - pricing date vs billing date
entry.content:
Dear Collegue 

We have had a argentine customer claim for a customer invoice because it has wrong calculation of J1X1 Perception and J1A1 Perception. 
We have checked the cause: the requirements 81 and 82 where not fullfilled because the customer master tax grouping records ( table knat) was checked against the pricing date ( komk-prsdt) instead of the billing date ( komk-fkdat) 

In fact , we have found note 1747589 - 1256361 that applies a correction to formula 333 for using billing date instead of pricing date, but 
we have not found any note to be applied related to requirements 81 and 82 for correcting the way it access to table knat using billing date .
We attached the abap code for routines  81 and 82 were it is used the pricing date ( komk-prsdt) for table knat.  

Aditionally, J1X1 and J1A1 conditions are set as pricing date = billing date  in the sap standard ( T685A-KPRDT = C = billing date ) 

Someone had had the same problem? Did you find a solution with a SAP oss note?
We are willing to avoid to  copy the requeriments 81 and 82 to a custom solution to use billing date instead of pricing date , if there is a note to be applied. 

Also we find that in these routines it is not check standard localization table j_1at001tc where it is defined if the perception is active por the company code. 

It seems argentine localization requirements 81 and 82 are not as far as complete ...

Thanks in advance for your imputs
Viviana 

routine 81 - program LV61A081
* check if date is in the subjected interval and therefore valid
      if knat-sbjdf le komk-prsdt and
         knat-sbjdt ge komk-prsdt.
         lv_subrc = 0.
      endif.

routine 82 - program LV61A082
 check if date is in the subjected interval and therefore valid
    if knat-sbjdf le komk-prsdt and
       knat-sbjdt ge komk-prsdt.
      lv_subrc = 0.

entry.title: Re: Security Vulnerability in SAP Crystal Reports for Ecl...
entry.content:
I heard back from R&D:

apache-mime4j-core-0.8.9.jar is used to parse XML/web service data sources, If you don’t use XML/web service as the data source, this CVE won’t affect you.

When using Crystal Report for Eclipse, users must first ensure that the data source is secure, so the impact of this CVE on us is also limited.

Additionally, we can consider upgrading it in SP32.

Hope this answers your questions?

Don

entry.title: Issue with Custom Field Data Flowing from Sales Quotation to Sales Order
entry.content:
We got a requirement to Create a Custom field at Sales Quotation Item level and the Value Given at Quotation level should flow to subsequent Sales Order. The field is getting created in both Sales Quotation and Sales Order but the values which entered at Quotation level are not flowing to Sales order.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Issue with Custom Field Data Flowing from Sales Quota...
entry.content: Please check if your have enabled the business scenario 'Sales Document to Sales Document on Item Level'.

entry.title: Re: Does the search string functionality work for the CAMT.053 format?
entry.content: the question really is what tags are included in the search for string on the camt file. On the MT940 it looked at part of the 61 line and the 86 line. I presume it is the remittance info USTRD

entry.title: ABAPConf 2025
entry.content:
Am 4. Juni 2025 ist ADventas einer der Gastgeber der ABAPConf 2025 in Hamburg!

Die Konferenz für den SAP Full Stack Entwickler - ABAP und Fiori. Hier teilen ABAP-Entwickler ihre Projekterfahrungen und stellen ihre Best Practices vor.

Seid mit vor Ort dabei und meldet euch über die Warteliste unter folgendem Link an: https://loom.ly/V9noCio

Informationen zur gesamten ABAPConf 2025 findet ihr hier: ABAPConf 2025

entry.title: Re: Sales rebate agreement for a single customer based on...
entry.content:
Hi @Hadjolian, 

Yes, this scenario is technically possible in SAP Condition Contract Management (CCM) and does not necessarily require custom development.

In SAP CCM, the contract owner—typically the rebate recipient (Customer A)—is independent from the business volume selection criteria defined in the contract. This means you can create a Condition Contract with Customer A as the rebate recipient, while selecting billing documents from Customers B, C, and D using the Business Volume Selection Criteria tab in the contract.

Regards,
Gauthier VICTOR

entry.title: Default G/L account during post goods movement 711 and 712
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

During post goods movements (Migo) for stock adjustment (711 712) it is mandatory to fill in a G/L account. Is it possible to fill somewhere a default G/L account per movement type? I checked automatic account determination app but cannot find an option. And in Manage default account assignment, a default cost center can be add to a cost element.

Regards

entry.title: Re: Experience Your Favourite BI Platform, BOBJ, in a Fresh New Look with the SAP BI 2025 Release
entry.content:
Hi @ayman_salem,

Thanks for commenting on the new license key requirement... I actually thought it is regular practice and did not took time to mention about it initially... however, I have added the info about it now.

Regards, Venkat.

entry.title: Re: Welcome to SAP BusinessObjects BI 2025
entry.content:
Hi @ayman_salem, @r_poelstra,

Here is the KBA related to new license key requirement 2282189 - New license keys required for 4.3/2025(and later).

@r_poelstra, I have checked emergency License Keys, and I could see the keys related to BI 2025 in that file. And also in the https://me.sap.com/licensekey license key requesting tool as well I could see the BI 2025 version getting displayed in the list. can you please check again and let us know, if it is still a problem.

Regards, Venkat.

entry.title: Re: Measures hierarchy in SAP Datasphere Analytic model
entry.content: Achso :). You cannot do structures. I used two ways #1. spaces in the name of the measure in SAC. #2 in DSP transposed into account model, created a measure / account hierarchy (via CSV) and used. This worked fine and is easy to maintain. You can directly associate the hierarchy view to your account dimension view

entry.title: Re: SAP CPI to Microsoft SharePoint Adapter Integration
entry.content: How to get files and read data ? I don't see get file just like upload file

entry.title: CDP Data Access>>Exports feature
entry.content:
Hello Community,

Has anyone had recent experience with using the SAP CDP Data Access>>Exports feature?

I am building out a use case where I need to extract out the Customer Profile and Activities data from our CDP instance. I would like to setup a job in the System that can run on a scheduler (nightly run) and has a date selection feature that allows to go back n days.

We can do a full Export of data using the Exports, but it seems limited when attempting to run for a Delta scenario, where the scheduling component of the feature seems missing.

Genuinely would appreciate some input.

Best,

Owen

entry.title: Re: Joule for SAP S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition - A Comprehensive Setup Guide
entry.content: Can Joule still be enabled if we have an embedded Fiori deployment for S/4HANA?

entry.title: Re: Fiscal year variant change
entry.content: Can you please let us know if this is possible to change in 3 system landscape, We have the dev system activated with Fiscal Year Variant V3 but we want to change it to S3. We have not done any transactions on Dev system and has not provisioned test and production

entry.title: Re: Hands-on Tutorial: Creating an FAQ assistant as tool for a BTP AI agent
entry.content: Great blog!

entry.title: PPF Action Profile for Updating Picking Task in S/4HANA Before Packing and PGI
entry.content:
Hello Everyone,

Could you please advise on the appropriate PPF Action Profile to update the picking task in S/4HANA as soon as the picking task is completed in EWM, prior to packing and Post Goods Issue (PGI)?

I have reviewed the available Action Profiles, but I have not been able to identify the exact standard one for this requirement. Kindly let me know if there is a standard solution available, or if customization is necessary to achieve this functionality.

Looking forward to your insights.

Best regards,
Gowthamparasa

entry.title: Licensing Question for Retired Employee Central
entry.content:
We are trying to understand Employee Central Functional License:

  • SAP SuccessFactors License Compliance Module Details
  • 2978690 - Differences Between Full and Functional Users for Employee Central License

 

The document mention that :

 

SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central, core HR option, functional use is available only for the following categories of individuals:

 

  • Former employees whose records continue to be maintained;

Which means that they are : User has an active pensioner relationship with the company (is paid a pension or equivalent by the company, or their personal data and claims need to be still updated (after employment termination) for the purpose of outsourcing the execution of pensions, similar claims, or payments post termination).

 

Are Retiree in Employee Central (Retiree in emplstatus/employee profile inactive) will they count as a functional license?  Can you bring clarity how we identify Retiree with an active pensioner relationship in SF from a licensing perspective? Is it all “Retired” employee status employee?  Is it that they are getting a part of their EC profile updated within a certain period? Or that they are being actively replicated to ECC?

entry.title: Re: Missing descriptions in Text
entry.content:
Yes 🙂

You have to go for two characters. Else the language settings from your profile will not work. 

You can bypass this however. You do not create Text Views (you can assoc only one without a warning and one never knows which DSP update turns the warning into an error). You join the text field directly into you master data view, set the semantic to text and assign as text in attributes. Then you will not have lang-dependent text however.

entry.title: Re: SAP JAVA PO - Error "Alert Fatal: handshake failure" on webservice
entry.content:
Hi Ryan,

Thanks for the input.  I now successfully activated HTTPS on the PO system, unfortunately still same error.

No certificates required as per functional PO consultant, the header contains a Header “apiKey”.  She can send queries from postman to the external URL without additional certificates when this "apiKey" is included.

entry.title: Re: Crystal Reports 2016 with varchar(max)
entry.content: Thanks for your reply. I have attempted to access the SQL Server database using the Microsoft ODBC driver in both CR2016 and CR2020 and still all of my varchar(MAX) fields are showing up as String [255] in my field explorer

entry.title: Re: Crystal Reports 2016 with varchar(max)
entry.content: This also didn't seem to help https://userapps.support.sap.com/sap/support/knowledge/en/1422831

entry.title: JDBC Target structure not mapping the source structure fields in the output
entry.content:
Hi All,

I am developing an ODATA to JDBC structure. I have 2 statement nodes in my JDBC target structure, one performs the DELETE operation and other performs INSERT on the same table. However, while mapping the source to target, the JDBC output structure is only populating the Constants mapped to the fields. It isn't populating any of the fields from source structure. Any suggestions on what I could be doing wrong?

Thanks!

entry.title: Re: Offline Mass Update of Purchasing Info Records through Microsoft Excel
entry.content:
Hello guys!

What can I do if the Fiori doesn't appear in my home page? I can't search in the searchbar.

I have the role SAP_BR_BPC_EXPERT and SAP_BR_PURCHASER but I can't see.

I try to follow the steps in this article: https://userapps.support.sap.com/sap/support/knowledge/en/2877608 but the catalog isn't in the role, and even exist (SAP_CA_BC_IC_LND_BASE).

thanks

Javier Lazcano

entry.title: Re: My Partner Rewards App Retirement and Consolidation with SAP for Me!

Regards!! Aline

entry.title: Re: SAP Business Data Cloud - FAQs
entry.content:
Great document Jeet, 

Please, hope you or anyone could clarify it. We are thinking about doing lift and shift of our BW on HANA (7.5) to PCE (as is). Final target, by 2030, is really decommission PCE and have all data flows migrated to BDC (to Datasphere component).

Now, we can also do nothing, keep our BW and prepare to pay for the maintenance extension. Still, we start migrating our data flows to BDC. Which seems to be way more complex than automation available in PCE version.

Question is:

How good is "Out-of-the-Box Data Product Generation" in PCE? Is it a good to automatic migrate a regular data flow: ODP Datasource ->> Transformation ->> aDSO ->> Composite Provider to a native Datasphere component? 

I believe any ABAP code in transformation will need to be manually rewrite, which is fine.  

* BW Bridge is out of scope. 

Thanks for your inputs,

Marcelo

When I press F12, the console shows me the following error:

Thanks for all the help!

entry.title: HCM Brasil: Crédito do Trabalhador - eConsignado
entry.content:
Olá a todos, bem-vindos ao blog post com as atualizações sobre o Crédito do Trabalhador!

O governo publicou a medida provisória 1.292/2025 no dia 12/03/2025 criando o programa Crédito do Trabalhador. Também conhecido como eConsignado, este programa é um novo sistema de crédito consignado destinado a trabalhadores com vínculo empregatício ativo, acessível através da Carteira de Trabalho Digital.

A abrangência desse programa é um aspecto que chama a atenção. Empregados domésticos, trabalhadores rurais e pessoas contratadas por microempreendedores individuais (MEI) estão incluídos no público alvo da iniciativa.

Como será o fluxo de funcionamento deste novo programa?

  1. No app da Carteira de Trabalho Digital (CTPS Digital), o trabalhador poderá solicitar propostas de crédito diretamente com instituições financeiras autorizadas pelo Governo Federal. Posteriormente, o trabalhador receberá as ofertas das instituições financeiras, podendo analisar a melhor opção e concluir a contratação. Após a efetivação da contratação, o empregador receberá mensalmente, em sua caixa postal no Domicílio Eletrônico Trabalhista (DET), um aviso sobre a contratação do empréstimo.
  2. O empregador deverá acessar mensalmente a plataforma Emprega Brasil para fazer o download do arquivo com as informações dos empréstimos de seus trabalhadores e incluir os valores das parcelas na folha de pagamento.
  3. Após a inclusão da parcela na folha de pagamento, através de uma rubrica de desconto classificada com a natureza 9253 - Empréstimos eConsignado - Desconto, o valor será enviado ao eSocial, e os valores estarão disponíveis para recolhimento através das guias de pagamento disponibilizadas no FGTS Digital.

Como será o calendário de contratação e descontos em folha de pagamento?

Os empréstimos contratados até o dia 20 de cada mês serão descontados e enviados para o eSocial no mês subsequente.

Calendário de contratação: Do dia 21 do mês anterior até o dia 20 do mês atual.

Desconto da primeira parcela: Folha de pagamento do mês subsequente.

Exemplo:

O trabalhador fez todos os trâmites e realizou a contratação de um empréstimo no dia 21/03/2025. O primeiro desconto deste empréstimo deve ser realizado pelo empregador na folha de pagamento do mês de maio de 2025.

IMPORTANTE: Conforme determinado na medida provisória, os trabalhadores poderão solicitar propostas somente a partir do dia 21/03/2025, ou seja, o primeiro desconto ocorreria apenas na folha do mês de maio de 2025.

O que esperar da SAP?

A SAP, como participante do GT-Piloto, participou de inúmeros testes e reuniões a cerca deste programa junto aos times técnicos do governo. Mesmo antes de qualquer publicação oficial, trabalhamos intensamente na análise e busca de soluções.

Após todo esse engajamento, a SAP planeja ter uma solução standard para o Crédito do Trabalhador - eConsignado. A solução deverá permitir o lançamento dos descontos de empréstimos na folha de pagamento e preenchimento dos eventos do eSocial.

Quando a SAP irá entregar a solução?

Nosso planejamento visa ter uma solução mínima viável para que nossos clientes possam rodar o primeiro desconto na folha de pagamento de maio de 2025. Com isso, a data de entrega da solução está planejada para 05/05/2025. Como de costume, essa é a data limite planejada e há possibilidade de realizarmos entregas parciais para que nossos clientes e parceiros possam ir adequando os sistemas de forma incremental.

Vocês já podem acompanhar esse tópico no Regulatory Change Manager, onde a data planejada de entrega será atualizada em breve.

Importante destacar que ainda podem ser publicadas regulamentações adicionais (portarias, notas técnicas e etc) que podem impactar as soluções de sistema e processos operacionais das empresas.

Onde eu encontro mais informações sobre o Crédito do Trabalhador - eConsignado?

  • Notícia publicada pelo governo no dia 12/03/2025.
  • Medida Provisória 1.292/2025 publicada também no dia 12/03/2025.

Esperamos que esse blog post tenha esclarecido as suas principais dúvidas sobre esse novo programa criado pelo governo.

Gostou desse post? Dê um Like e compartilhe o conteúdo com seus colegas.

Fiquem à vontade para deixar um feedback, comentário ou pergunta sobre este Blog post no espaço abaixo. E não esqueçam de seguir a tag HCM Payroll Brazil na SAP Community para ficarem ligados nas últimas notícias.

Um abraço,        

Leandro D’Avila

entry.title: SAP Developer News March 13th, 2025
entry.content:
DESCRIPTION 

Podcast:  https://podcast.opensap.info/sap-developers/2025/03/13/sap-developer-news-march-13th-2025/ 

CAP Release February 2025 

  • CAP Februrary Release Notes https://cap.cloud.sap/docs/releases/feb25 

SAP CodeJam News 

  • CodeJam events https://community.sap.com/t5/sap-codejam/eb-p/codejam-events 
  • CodeJam discussions and blog posts https://community.sap.com/t5/sap-codejam/gh-p/code-jam  

SAP March Developer Challenge – AI 

  • Blog post https://community.sap.com/t5/artificial-intelligence-and-machine-learning-blogs/sap-developer-challenge-march-sap-community-escape-house-ai/ba-p/14030669 

 

CHAPTER TITLES  

0:00 Intro 

0:10 CAP February 2025 Release Notes 

1:55 SAP CodeJam News  

4:00 Reminder SAP March Developer Challenge - AI 

 

TRANSCRIPTION

[Intro] This is the SAP Developer News for March 13th, 2025.  

[Kevin] The February release of CAP is here, and it is a major one. This release is introducing CDS version 9 that will contain changes that you must react on if you want to adapt it. So let me go over some of the changes. First up, migrate your ESLint configuration from version 8 to version 9. Also, at the test support package for your tests to properly run using CDS version 9, and the package is already available today. Remove the compatibility flags and enable at @SAP/cds 9 features like the new CDS Pauser, upgrade to the Access Security version 4 package, and adopt the new CAPGS database service packages for SQLite, Postgres and HANA. There are also features being deprecated and you should check the list under the release notes to fully understand how this might affect you and what your options are. Of course, there is a grace period until removal of those deprecated features, so no worries, you got some time. With the new release, you will get a brand-new standalone CDS-Types package for TypeScript, which is not depending on ad-SAP-CDS anymore. And now coming to Java, the new release brings the new major version of CAP Java, version 3.0. In addition to advanced security features and latest dependency versions, there are also some incompatible changes that optimized runtime behavior. Most of the changes can be consumed already in the previous version 2.10, which guarantees a smooth transition finally. There are so many more changes and features added with the new version I can't cover them all. So, make sure to follow the link in the description to carefully go through all the release notes.

[DJ] You might know about the 321 backup strategy, three copies of your data on two different media types with one copy kept off site. Well, we've got a three to one item on the subject of SAP codeJams for you. We've got three related co-jams topics, two developer advocates, and one fantastic roadshow in the form of the Tall and Suite. Get it, tour, no less. It stops in different countries delivering code jams across three different but strongly related topics. We've got creating apps, processes and sites with SAP Build, SAP Integration Suite and Event-driven Integrations, and last but certainly not least, event-based processes with SAP Build Process Automation. This third one is a new one, combining SAP Integration Suite Advanced Event Mesh and SAP Build Process Automation. And we've got two of our lovely developer Advocate colleagues, Daniel and Antonio, who are going to be conducting this road show over the next few months, spring and summer, culminating with a grand finale at SAP TechEd in Berlin in November. Tickets are on sale now! No, I just wanted to say that. Get into the spirit of this whole roadshow idea. No, registration is as normal, and of course, as always, all our CodeJams are free to attend. Right, so talking of CodeJams, we've just recently announced one, in May, in s-Hertogenbosch, in the Netherlands, hosted by new founders. It's on the SAP Cloud Application Programming model, that's CAP to us human beings, and covers a ton of the fundamentals driven by a focus on service integration. What's not to like? Anyway, check out the links to the CodeJam events and CodeJam discussions and blog posts areas on the SAP community to find out more and to register. And I hope to see you at a CodeJam soon.

[Mamikee] Hey SAP developers, just a quick reminder about this month's SAP Developer Challenge. This month is all about generative AI Hub on SAP, AI Core, and the SAP HANA Cloud Vector Engine. Your challenge is to solve AI-driven puzzles, explore generative AI in SAP, and make your way through the escape house. But don't wait long, the challenge closes on March 31st, and to earn a badge, you must escape the room before the deadline. Also, all the service keys needed to access the generative of AI Hub will be inactivated after the challenge ends. The room will stay unlocked until the end of the year, so you can still try it out later using your own system. And remember, this year's challenge is one full challenge, no weekly challenge. So, what are you waiting for? Click the link in the description, start solving, and let us know how you get. Good luck.

entry.title: Re: How to use create condition contract when the conditi...
entry.content: You have two options really - 1) try to append BAPICCCONDITIONKEY and BAPICCCONDITIONKEYX with PROD_HIER1 PROD_HIER2 PROD_HIER3 and see if your version of the BAPI will take them, or 2) open an incident with SAP to ask if this is even possible. From what I see, the BAPI we use was changed by SAP back in 2023.

entry.title: How to get list of model versions information in PowerDesigner?
entry.content:
If I have one folder in repository, and the folder has subfolders, each subfolder has multiple models.

How do I list each model version info (version number, creator, the time each version created), plus all sub-folder names? 

For example:

FolderA-SubfolderA1-ModelM v3 *** John Doe - Tuesday, March 11, 2025 4:11:55PM ***

FolderA-SubfolderA1-ModelM v2 *** Jane Doe - Tuesday, Jan 12, 2025 10:21:34PM ***

FolderA-SubfolderA1-ModelM v1 *** Peter Doe - Friday, Dec 4, 2024 6:05:08AM ***

This is can be done by SQL queries?

entry.title: Re: How to use create condition contract when the conditi...
entry.content: Thanks a lot for the suggestions. Option 1 is tried but did not work . So I will try the option 2.

entry.title: unit2-lession2 subdomain error
entry.content:
Hi,

got an error by executing your code: 

btp_subaccount.project_subaccount: Creating...
╷
│ Error: API Error Creating Resource Subaccount
│ 
│   with btp_subaccount.project_subaccount,
│   on main.tf line 1, in resource "btp_subaccount" "project_subaccount":
│    1: resource "btp_subaccount" "project_subaccount" {
│ 
│ Subdomain dev-project-abc already exists in the current region [Error: 20007/409]

solved this by changing subdomain value.

entry.title: How to get the Cumulate Value in Data action - SAP Analytic cloud
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I need your help with a data action. I’ve tried several approaches, but have had no luck.

I have three measures: Periodic Cost, Cumulative Cost, and Flag. I want to accumulate the values of Periodic Cost from previous periods and post them into the Cumulative Cost measure for the period marked by the Flag measure (where the Flag value is always "1" for the FLAG Measure).

List of Dimensions : Product, version, date , product and Measure

for example 

Source Values              
ProductMeasures202501202502202503202504202505202506202507202508202509202510202511202512Total
Product1Periodic COST1000 3000 500       4500
Product1FLAG      1      
Product2Periodic COST 500 650 50      1200
Product2FLAG          1  
Expected Values              
Product1Cumulate COST      450045004500450045004500 
Product2Cumulate COST          12001200

entry.title: Re: Experience Your Favourite BI Platform, BOBJ, in a Fresh New Look with the SAP BI 2025 Release
entry.content: VenkateswaraGupthaY: I agree with you. Any upgrade of SAP BI has always included generation of new license keys. In one case even just for installation of a new Service Pack! An impo9rtant question is, if there is any cost associated with the generation of new license keys, provided that you are paying for the annual support. I assume, there is no additional cost.

entry.title: Re: Recruit-to-Hire Data Mapping for nonrecurring pay components

entry.title: Re: Deploy SAP Integration Suite - Edge Integration Cell - on Google Cloud Platform
entry.content:
Great Blog Alex.

Looking forward to working with enterprises running the Edge Integration Cell on GKE

entry.title: Re: Cloud ALM - can't change actual completion date
entry.content:
Hi, GillBegnor,
There currently is no means to edit the Actual Completion Date of a task.  As you seem to know, when you set the status of the Task to Done, it records the date this is set as the Actual Completion Date.

I searched the Influencer Campaign program for Cloud ALM's Implementation -> 

https://influence.sap.com/sap/ino/#/campaign/3501

and found request:

Ability to change Actual Completion Date for a Task
Request
322975
Category
Project and Tasks
You can logon there and up-vote this entry, if you would like.
Best regards,
Paula

entry.title: Re: Missing descriptions in Text
entry.content: Hello Martin. Thanks for your reply. I understand what you are saying, but what I am trying to do seems to be aligned with Sap best practices. If you check the official documentation provided by Sap, you will see that the conversion should be done automatically by Datasphere, and do not require any custom solution (which I already have) (BW7.5, or BW4, as you probably know, does it). Regards. Andrea

entry.title: Re: Security Vulnerability in SAP Crystal Reports for Ecl...
entry.content:
Thank you again DonWilliams

That is good to know, we do not use XML/Web services as the datasource, so we are testing the application without this jar file and so far it seems OK

Regarding SP32, that doesnt seem to be available on the website?
https://pages.community.sap.com/topics/crystal-reports
note that SP31 is the latest service pack for SAP Crystal Reports for Eclipse (JAVA) on that link
Is there another public link for SP32?

Thank you!

entry.title: Re: Net value of Proforma invoice is not zero in Proforma...
entry.content:
Hi, 

please check below SAP HELP: 

Custom logic: Condition amount - https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/a376cd9ea00d476b96f18dea1247e6a5/f90a91ef60d345b0aa49e919f481d2d7.html?locale=en-US

Custom logic: Condition base value - https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/a376cd9ea00d476b96f18dea1247e6a5/a6d37c82cccc4df293cb4dae33a32358.html?locale=en-US

Custom logic: Requirement - https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/a376cd9ea00d476b96f18dea1247e6a5/82e0fb545ab4495ea83511ba57465e28.html?locale=en-US

entry.title: Re: Crystal Reports 2016 with varchar(max)
entry.content:
Check the Registry keys you created, you must use RegEdit by right clicking on the regsvr.exe and selecting Run as Administrator and note:

Set the value to a number between 0 and 65534 (decimal). Notes: - This specifies the string size of the VARCHAR(MAX) and NVARCHAR(MAX) fields. - If the key is not set or set to 0, the ODBC driver will map VARCHAR(MAX) and NVARCHAR(MAX) fields to Memo type, which can not be used to join/link.

I checked my reports and they show up as Memo.

How are you connecting OLE DB or ODBC? Those reg keys won't work for OLE DB.

Which MS Client did you use?

entry.title: Re: Cloud ALM - can't change actual completion date
entry.content: I don't understand what you are suggesting here. I've logged this as an improvement request and the functionality is still not available. Are you asking me to up-vote my request? I have already voted for it.

entry.title: Re: Rollout of SAP S/4 HANA Public cloud to different cou...
entry.content:
Hi, 

when You extend SAP Public cloud to different country You don't have different tenant -> all is on the same tenant.

entry.title: Re: Tablet won't display PDF inside of an item without op...
entry.content:
My apologies for the late response; I have been out of office.

No, unfortunately that did not fix the issue. After fixing and re-uploading, I am still being prompted to download.

entry.title: Re: How to add an item ( batch ) to delivery with 'WS_DELIVERY_UPDATE_2' ?
entry.content:
Hello @BergOff 

I can't answer you question directly as WS_DELIVERY_UPDATE_2 is not documented. As it is really by trial and error you can figure out the correct way to call the function. 

But there is a indirect approach via Delivery Interface i.e. WHSCON IDoc. As per SAP Help the IDoc can report batch split items:

You can build a test WHSCON IDoc in WE19 and verify that it updates a delivery the way you want. The IDocs are posted with the WS_DELIVERY_UPDATE_2 function. So you can put a breakpoint in the function and check how the IDoc data are communicated to the function. This will show you have to call the function to add a deliver split item.

Best regards

Dominik Tylczynski

entry.title: Re: Tablet won't display PDF inside of an item without op...
entry.content: Also, just for clarification, when I say "open in a new window", I mean that LMS prompts me to download. Once I download, I open it and it opens in a new browser tab/window. It still does not natively display in LMS even in the new tab/window.

entry.title: Automatic Invoice Posting of Forwarding Agent against Shipment Cost Document
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

The following process will shed light on How to post Automatic Invoice Posting of Forwarding Agent for Shipment Cost Document.


Problem Statement:

The problem is that invoices of forwarding agents are being posted manually through journal voucher, in which, shipment cost number/shipment number is being entered manually in the narration or in a text field. Due to this, manual reconciliation is being conducted between Shipping Cost Document and Forwarding Agent Invoice as there is no synchronization between these documents and duplicate invoice is being posted along with payments disburse to vendors.

Solution:

To overcome the above problem the following configuration to be completed to post Automatic Invoice Posting of Forwarding Agent against Shipment Cost Document.

Step-1:               Map Vendor Partner Role IP (Invoicing Party) with Freight Carrier Account Group.

Step-2:               Define Item Category for Shipment Cost type by following path:

Step-3:              Define Item Category for Shipment Cost type as per your business requirements.

Step-4:              Assign Purchasing Data with respective Transportation Planning Plant and Plant by following path:

Step-5:         Purchase Organization, Purchasing Group to be mapped with Transportation Planning point, shipment cost type and Plant.

Step-6:         Assign respective Cost Element with respective GL account for respective company code by following path.

Step-7:         Condition type FT00 to be added in respective Shipment Cost Pricing Procedure and maintain with respective access sequence in transaction code – TK11.

Step-8:         Below these options to be ticked in respective Freight Carrier Vendor.

Step-9:         ERS output/pricing conditions to be maintained for respective forwarding agent.

Step-10:      After configuring/maintaining above settings/conditions ERS Service PO and Service Entry Sheet will be automatically created at the time of saving of Shipment Cost Document and display under “Service Procurement” tab of Shipment Cost Document. Also, Shipment Number displayed under “Purchase Order History” tab of Purchase Order.

Step-11:         After above steps, go to transaction MRRL and post the ERS invoice or schedule a batch job for program “RMMR1MRS” to avoid manual intervention to post the ERS invoice.

Step-12:         Now go to transaction FBL1N and check respective Freight Vendor Account to check posting/amount of Freight Vendor.

To Conclude:

Once the above steps will be executed successfully the business will get the correct account balance of freight vendor to avoid any dispute in the future related to duplicate invoicing or payment. It will also reduce the efforts of manual reconciliation.

Thanks for your interest! Please share feedback, comments or suggestions below.

Best Regards,
Neeraj Jain
SAP Technical Manager in HCL Technologies Limited

entry.title: Re: S4 HANA Public Cloud Custom Condition types
entry.content:
For pricing I recommend below learning journey UNIT 9 - https://learning.sap.com/learning-journeys/implementing-sap-s-4hana-cloud-public-edition-sales-automation-analytics-and-configuration

There You can find how to add routines and conditions.

entry.title: Re: Bank accounts cannot be deleted
entry.content:
I hope you are doing good.

Probably the difference between both environment is the Manage Bank Account settings.

To delete an active bank account, you need to remove all linked house bank accounts first.

Only house bank accounts that have no record of being used in transactions can be removed. For example, if the system finds the house bank account has been used in accounting documents, bank statements, or have records in the One Exposure from Operations hub, the house bank account cannot be deleted. In this case, if the bank account is no longer in use, you can close the bank account.

The system also checks whether a house bank account has been used in any payment-related configuration settings. If a house bank account has been used in such settings, you can remove the relevant settings following the instructions provided in the error messages. You can then remove the house bank account once it has been removed from all relevant settings.

For more info please check SAP S/4HANA Help Portal : Deleting Bank Accounts - https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/186460fdc35a4b64a713da9bb00deb1e/f8c9cf68f3594b24bb9b86a1a7cdf7a3.html

Best regards,

Fabio

entry.title: Method transport syntax check error due to "old alias code" presence (ZCX exception class)
entry.content:
Hello,

I had a weird error when transporting a custom exception class (ZCX inheriting from CX_NO_CHECK).

I explain what the issue was, how I solved, but my question is about how to avoid the issue in the future.

So, here was the issue:

I had a transport request which contains all sections and all methods of the class as LIMU entries (CLSD, CPUB, CPRO, CPRI, METH).

After importing the transport request in a system, I had a syntax error although the code should be theoretically the same as the code in the development system.

To my big surprise, in the target system, in the table TMDIR (index of methods), I can see that the methods are "duplicated", I expect only the methods with the interface names:

Via SE24, I can see that the code of IF_MESSAGE~GET_LONGTEXT contains the old code (I suspect that it looks at the method at index 2), but the code of IF_MESSAGE~GET_TEXT contains the new code (I guess it's the method at index 5). The transport log doesn't show any error (except the syntax error), and if I compare "import phase" of the transport logs of two systems, one with error, one without error, the import phases show exactly the same information, which mention only the method at indexes 4 and 5, e.g. "method IF_MESSAGE~GET_LONGTEXT include ZCX======CM004 will be imported as ZCX======CM004")

Probably the history of the source code explains the situation (but it's not sufficient to explain why it didn't happen in the other systems):

 

Version 1: the class creation was via Eclipse ADT with this code:

METHODS get_longtext REDEFINITION.

METHODS get_text REDEFINITION.

 

Version 2: it was changed via Form-Based ABAP Editor (transport was OK) - The only explanation I could find why the interface name was added to the method redefinitions is that the menu "Utilities > Regenerate sections" was used, other modifications and functions don't seem to add the interface name:

methods IF_MESSAGE~GET_LONGTEXT redefinition .

methods IF_MESSAGE~GET_TEXT redefinition .

 

Version 3: the source code was changed again via Eclipse ADT, and the transport failed:

METHODS get_longtext REDEFINITION.

METHODS get_text REDEFINITION.

 

That's also weird because in some other systems, although the transports were done exactly in the same sequence, and they seem to be all the same versions and support packages, the two "alias methods" were removed between version 2 and version 3: in these systems, in TMDIR, after version 3 was imported, I see the two methods IF_MESSAGE~GET_LONGTEXT and IF_MESSAGE~GET_TEXT (which demonstrates that using METHODS get_text REDEFINITION without the interface name is not always an issue). Note that in these systems, these methods are assigned the indexes "4" and "5".

The issue was solved by transporting the whole class using R3TR CLAS ZCX... The two old methods "2" and "3" were removed, only the latest code is kept, as you can see:

So, my two questions are:

  1. Why is there an error, did I miss an SAP note?
  2. How to avoid this error in the future, should we always opt for one variant of METHODS REDEFINITION?

I'd love it if you can find some links to SAP documentation about this issue.

Thanks for reading!
Sandra

Systems: all are 7.40 SP 23, kernel 753 SP 1300

NB: I guess that the error is not limited to exceptions classes (but I can't be sure of course), it's probably related to any classes where the methods are:

  1. defined in interfaces,
  2. "aliased" in the class implementing the interface (as it happens in CX_ROOT),
  3. are redefined in a subclass (as it happens in my ZCX class)

(For my reference, the transport request is XXXK910882)

entry.title: Re: SAP MM hana public apps and configuration list
entry.content:
Hi, 

all fiori apps You can find in this link https://fioriappslibrary.hana.ondemand.com/sap/fix/externalViewer/#/home

Inside for all app Yo will have information about implementation, authorization etc.

entry.title: Re: 'Modify' stmt showing sy-subrc = 0 for duplicate record
entry.content: Answer is here: https://help.sap.com/doc/abapdocu_latest_index_htm/latest/en-US/index.htm?file=abapmodify_dbtab.htm . 4 happens only for a duplicate in a SECONDARY unique index. MODIFY is an "UPSERT". It tries to INSERT but if it exists it does an UPDATE.

entry.title: Display PE51 Payslip on Adobe From
entry.content:
Hi,

I am looking for a way to display a payslip rendered as a PE51 form on a interactive adobe form. I found 3 function modules that gives me the payslip according to the variant... BAPI_GET_PAYSLIP, BAPI_GET_PAYSLIP_PDF and BAPI_GET_PAYSLIP_HTML. I am looking for a way to either display HTML or the SAP Script table output or the PDF binary out on a custom adobe form? Any suggestions on how to do it? I was thinking of either sending the pdf binary to a image object on the adobe form or sending the SAP Script to a text object?

Just a few comments.. No I don't want to create a payslip in HRFORMS and no I don't want to convert the SAP Script straight to PDF.. I need to get that data to a custom adobe form:)

Kind Regards

Deon

entry.title: Builder is currently unable to access the data source error
entry.content: I am getting this error for all the tables and charts within one of my stories. Other stories using the same datasource do not have the same issue. I have tried deleting the story and copying it back from our other tenant (where the same story doesn't have this issue), but that didn't help. However, if I recreate the page and then import that page into the broken story, it works just fine. This is the second time this has happened (different stories and different data sources), and I'm wondering if this is a known issue or if there is an easier way to resolve this rather than rebuilding the story from scratch. See screenshot:

entry.title: Re: Tablet won't display PDF inside of an item without op...
entry.content: No worries about the late response. Can you verify Chrome's configuration in the tablet, like explained in the KBA 2642946?

entry.title: Re: Add Relations in Operation using 'BAPI_ALM_ORDER_MAINTAIN'
entry.content: You must use the internal format using this function conversion CONVERSION_EXIT_CUNIT_INPUT
